articles.title: Foxborough files counterclaim to Patriots, Kraft Group’s lawsuit over annual stadium licensing fees
articles.description:
The town argues Kraft Sports is attempting to avoid contractual obligations by characterizing public safety reimbursements as unlawful licensing fees.

The post Foxborough files counterclaim to Patriots, Kraft Group’s lawsuit over annual stadium licensing fees appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Foxborough counters Patriots' lawsuit over stadium licensing fees on July 7, 2026.
Town claims Kraft Sports mischaracterizes public safety reimbursements as unlawful licensing fees.
Potential financial implications for local taxpayers if Kraft avoids contractual obligations.

articles.title: Monasterio and Rafaela homer to power Red Sox to an 8-1 win over White Sox
articles.description:
Boston (41-48) has won four in a row and nine of its last 11 to close within seven games of .500 for the first time since May 23.

The post Monasterio and Rafaela homer to power Red Sox to an 8-1 win over White Sox appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Red Sox defeated White Sox 8-1 on July 7, 2023.
Monasterio and Rafaela each hit home runs in the game.
Boston's record improves to 41-48, closing in on .500.
